title: Pinder Character v1
description: On-disk shape of a Pinder character file. Describes player-authored allocation only; bonuses from items/anatomy are recomputed at load time and never serialised here.
$comment: Issue #779: psychological_stake is optional — omitted from required so legacy files without it remain valid. New files and regenerated stakes write it directly.

schema_version.description: Schema version. v1 files MUST be exactly 1.

character_id.description: UUIDv4 identity. Stable across renames; the filename slug is presentation only.

name.description: Display name shown to opposing player and used in prompts.

bio.description: Short bio shown to opposing player.

level.description: Character level used for archetype eligibility and starter-points budget.

items.description: Equipped item ids; resolved against IItemRepository at load.

anatomy.description: Anatomy selections: parameter id (e.g. "length") -> tier id (e.g. "short").

psychological_stake.description: Issue #779: permanent psychological stake generated at character-creation time. Markdown bullet list of the character's core emotional motivations and vulnerabilities as injected into their LLM system prompt. Optional — absent on legacy files until regenerated.

allocation.description: Player-authored build-point allocation block. Bonuses NOT included here.

unspent_pool.description: Build points not yet allocated. Starter files all set this to 0.
